_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the max-consecutive-system-exceptions scenario (job-consecutive-system-exceptions playbook). The agent chains: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get (Info: max consecutive system exceptions) -> jobs logs (the recurring SelectorNotFoundException on 'Click Submit', 5x, before the abort) -> jobs traces (same activity faults every transaction). Root cause = the recurring selector failure, not the threshold. Keys are stable.
